hero.tagline: <openSource>Bitsocial is an open-source</openSource> <p2p>peer-to-peer network</p2p> <socialApps>for social apps</socialApps>, <noServers>with no servers</noServers>, <noBans>no global bans</noBans>, <crypto>where users and communities are cryptographic property.</crypto>

footer.tagline: Open Source P2P Network for Social Apps
